title: Jango Moves to Carry Out Kuro’s Orders
description: On pages 0–3, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Huh? Where the hell is that guy....

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Wasn't he running ahead of me?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: who over- heard our plans. What do you want?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I have a 100 million crewmen waiting to kill you all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: only an idiot would fall for that...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Ah! They saw through my lie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do you think we're 2 year- olds?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: How dare you lie to me...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We found treasure on that wierd boat over there!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's quite a lot... Probably worth around 4... no, 5 million bell!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: 5 million? Why would those guys have so much money...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: But! I can give it to you!!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
